use_codes.desc: RELIEF OF SYMPTOMS ASSOCIATED WITH SEASONAL AND PERENNIAL ALLERGIC RHINITIS

indications.text:
1.1 Perennial Allergic Rhinitis
XYZAL is indicated for the relief of symptoms associated with perennial allergic rhinitis in children 6 months to 2 years of age.
